summary: Mobile UI bug fixes verification complete. All 4 reported bugs have been FIXED and verified on iPhone X viewport (375x812).
critical_code_review_comments: MemberDashboard.jsx (line ~1060-1078): Pet selector buttons have shrink-0 class and proper text sizing - names show with emojis correctly
MiraChatWidget.jsx (line ~1288-1304): X button has both onClick and onTouchEnd handlers with preventDefault - closes properly on mobile
MiraChatWidget.jsx (line ~1298-1310): Chat content wrapped in flex container with maxHeight and overflow-hidden - no header overlap
StayPage.jsx (line ~1126): Bundle prices use fallback (bundle.bundle_price || bundle.price || 0) - prices display correctly (₹1499, ₹1799, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 mobile UI bugs verified as FIXED. Pet selector shows names, Mira X button works, chat doesn't overlap header, bundle prices display correctly.

bug_1_pet_selector_names.evidence: Pet selectors show '🐕 Mystique ⭐', '🐕 Bruno', '🐕 Buddy', etc. with full names visible

bug_2_mira_x_button.evidence: X button closes Mira widget on click/touch. Both onClick and onTouchEnd handlers work correctly

bug_3_chat_scroll_overlap.evidence: Chat messages area starts at y=312px, well below the Mira header (~150px). No overlap with header
